    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>

    Provides a fluent API to configure JSON serialization rules for a specific entity type.

    Inheritance
    object
    EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.MemberwiseClone()
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.ToString()
    Namespace: FluentJson.Core.Builder
    Assembly: FluentJson.Core.dll
    Syntax
    public class EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TEntity

    The type of the entity being configured.
    Remarks

    Use this builder to map properties or fields, enforce required paths, or completely ignore members. It allows configuring private state and accessing private parameterless constructors.

    Methods

    | Edit this page View Source

    HasDerivedType<TDerived>(object)

    Maps a discriminator value to a concrete derived type for polymorphic deserialization.

    Declaration
    public EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> HasDerivedType<TDerived>(object value) where TDerived : TEntity
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    object value

    The discriminator value expected in the JSON payload.
    Returns
    Type Description
    EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>

    The same EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TDerived

    The concrete type deriving from TEntity.
    | Edit this page View Source

    HasDiscriminator(string)

    Configures the JSON property name used to discriminate derived types during polymorphic deserialization.

    Declaration
    public EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> HasDiscriminator(string propertyName)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string propertyName

    The name of the discriminator property in the JSON payload.
    Returns
    Type Description
    EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>

    The same EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    | Edit this page View Source

    Ignore(Expression<Func<TEntity, object?>>)

    Instructs the framework to completely ignore a specific property or field during serialization and deserialization.

    Declaration
    public EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> Ignore(Expression<Func<TEntity, object?>> propertyExpression)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Expression<Func<TEntity, object>> propertyExpression

    A lambda expression representing the member to ignore.
    Returns
    Type Description
    EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>

    The same EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    | Edit this page View Source

    PreserveReferences(bool)

    Configures the entity to preserve object references and properly handle circular references during serialization and deserialization.

    Declaration
    public EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> PreserveReferences(bool preserve = true)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    bool preserve
    Returns
    Type Description
    EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>

    The same EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    | Edit this page View Source

    Property<TProperty>(Expression<Func<TEntity, TProperty>>)

    Configures a property or field using a strongly-typed expression.

    Declaration
    public PropertyBuilder<TProperty> Property<TProperty>(Expression<Func<TEntity, TProperty>> propertyExpression)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Expression<Func<TEntity, TProperty>> propertyExpression

    A lambda expression representing the member access (e.g., x => x.Name).
    Returns
    Type Description
    PropertyBuilder<TProperty>

    A PropertyBuilder<TProperty> to further configure the mapped member.
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TProperty

    The type of the property being configured.
    Remarks

    This is the preferred method for mapping members as it provides compile-time safety and refactoring support.

    | Edit this page View Source

    Property<TProperty>(string)

    Configures a property or field by its string name.

    Declaration
    public PropertyBuilder<TProperty> Property<TProperty>(string propertyName)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string propertyName

    The name of the property or field to map.
    Returns
    Type Description
    PropertyBuilder<TProperty>

    A PropertyBuilder<TProperty> to further configure the mapped member.
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TProperty

    The type of the target member to configure.
    Remarks

    Useful for mapping private fields or properties that are not accessible via standard lambda expressions.
